members.label: plant
members.description: small potted plant on side table near couch
members.long_form_open_description: A small green potted plant sitting on the end table beside the couch near the lamp. Adds a touch of greenery; pot appears ceramic or small planter.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: On same side table as the lamp, between the couch and the hallway opening
